## Summary

## Type

- [ ] feat (new capability)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Version bumped in `plugin.json` and `marketplace.json` (if releasing)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] Any motion snippet honors `prefers-reduced-motion`
- [ ] No em dashes, no AI attribution
